positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a friendly, stylized astronaut floating among bioluminescent, oversized flora and fauna. The astronaut should be surrounded by gentle nebula clouds and floating geometric shapes, giving a sense of cosmic wonder. The style must be a blend of Art Nouveau and clean, graphic vector illustration, featuring thick, distinct outlines and flat color blocks with gradient accents. Use a limited but vibrant color palette of deep indigo, celestial teal, glowing gold, and pops of emerald green. Composition must be centered and highly symmetrical, perfect for repeating patterns or single-canvas apparel prints. Dramatic, soft volumetric lighting emanating from the bioluminescent elements. Extreme clarity, poster quality, vector art.
negative: blurry, grainy, dirty, artifacts, low resolution, watermark, text, logo, copyright, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poor composition, realistic photo, 3d render
